note: Sample failure genes (offline; no live bank store). Governance numbers come live from configs/failure_bank.yaml.

genes.avoid: 勿在 CI 重跑超過 2 次——曾掩蓋真實 race condition
genes.remedy: isolate the shared fixture; await the async write before assert

genes.avoid: 勿用 barrel re-export 串到會造成 import cycle 的 package
genes.remedy: import the concrete module path, not the index barrel

genes.avoid: patch 越界寫入即整包作廢——先 escalate 擴 write-set
